prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins with an aerial view of a dense city center surrounded by water. Tall buildings and streets are visible from above, with a somewhat faded, vintage-looking image quality. A “Nostalgic X’er” watermark appears in the lower-right corner.

The scene then changes to an interior domestic setting, likely a kitchen or dining nook. Four people sit or stand around a small table covered with a red-and-white checkered tablecloth. A woman standing at the left appears to be pouring a drink from a dark pot or carafe into a cup. Three others sit around the table: a younger person on the left, a middle-aged man in a dark uniform-like shirt at the center, and another person seen from behind/right. Cups and table items are visible, suggesting a shared coffee or mealtime setting.

The final frame is a black title card with large white text reading: “The first strong coffee without caffein.” A small square mark or logo appears near the lower-right area of the card, and the “Nostalgic X’er” watermark remains in the lower-right corner.
